summary: Completed e2e testing of TrendScout Workspace and Email Subscription features. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI elements verified working - Product Workspace page with status badges, notes, filters, and Notification Settings page with Weekly Email Reports toggles.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/workspace/products returns 200 with items list
Backend: Workspace items have required fields (id, product_id, launch_status, note, saved_at, product)
Backend: Workspace items enriched with latest product data
Backend: GET /api/workspace/products?status=researching filters by status
Backend: POST /api/workspace/products saves new product
Backend: POST /api/workspace/products duplicate returns 'Already saved'
Backend: POST /api/workspace/products without product_id returns 400
Backend: DELETE /api/workspace/products/{product_id} removes product
Backend: DELETE /api/workspace/products/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/note updates note
Backend: Note update persists and verifiable via GET
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{nonexistent}/note returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/status updates to researching
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/status updates to testing
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/status updates to launched
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/status updates to dropped
Backend: PUT /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/status invalid status returns 400
Backend: Status update persists and verifiable via GET
Backend: GET /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/check returns saved=true for saved products
Backend: GET /api/workspace/products/{product_id}/check returns saved=false for unsaved products
Backend: GET /api/email/subscription-status returns 200 with email preferences
Backend: Subscription preferences have weekly_digest and product_alerts fields
Backend: Workspace endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: Email subscription endpoint requires authentication
Frontend: /saved page loads with 'Product Workspace' heading
Frontend: Filter buttons display (All, Researching, Testing, Launched, Dropped) with counts
Frontend: Clicking filter button filters products correctly
Frontend: Saved products display in grid with images, names, categories, scores, margins
Frontend: Status badges visible on product cards (Testing, Researching, etc.)
Frontend: Status badges have chevron icons indicating dropdown
Frontend: Notes displayed on product cards with amber background
Frontend: Clicking note opens textarea editor with Cancel/Save buttons
Frontend: TikTok views and trend badges shown on product cards
Frontend: /settings/notifications page loads with correct heading
Frontend: Notification Channels section with Email/In-App toggles
Frontend: Weekly Email Reports section present
Frontend: Weekly Winning Products Digest toggle with description
Frontend: Product of the Week toggle with description
Frontend: Alert Threshold slider with 80+ default
Frontend: Quiet Hours section with enable toggle
Frontend: Notification Types section with 4 toggle types
Frontend: Save Changes button visible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows 'Mixed Content' errors for http://...api/notifications/ which is blocked - this is an infrastructure issue not affecting the tested features
seed_data_creation: Used existing saved products: 'Portable Neck Fan' (5d241fc9-383b-4dcc-b406-ba40590ed6a3) and 'Magnetic Phone Mount' (f6d631f2-00da-4ea5-9ca2-0ce2469856b0). Note from backend test: 'Persistence test note 12345' was added to first product.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TrendScout Workspace and Email Subscription features fully tested. Workspace endpoints: GET /api/workspace/products (list), POST (save), DELETE (remove), PUT .../note, PUT .../status, GET .../check. Email endpoint: GET /api/email/subscription-status returns email preferences. Frontend pages: /saved for Product Workspace, /settings/notifications for notification preferences. All data-testids present for testing. Status values: researching, testing, launched, dropped.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real MongoDB via workspace_products collection
